# Saga Labs

Independent AI studio that builds intelligent iOS applications and takes on selected AI implementation projects.

## Key facts

- Founded 2023.
- Public contact email: sagalabs@proton.me
- Website: https://sagalab.co/
- Domains of work: generative AI, on-device machine learning, iOS / SwiftUI, large language models, AI agents, MCP (Model Context Protocol), privacy-focused software.
- Studio model: builds and ships its own consumer apps + accepts a small number of external project engagements per quarter.
- Apps shipped: Dora (AI video & image generator), Pinku Private AI (on-device assistant with Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek), 3 Tasks (productivity), Brainy (AI writing helper), Crypton (crypto tracker), Keeper (encrypted file vault), Fast AI.
- Notable infrastructure work: built Dora MCP, a multi-model image and video generation server exposed at https://doravideo.com/mcp, listed in the official MCP Registry, Smithery, and Cursor Directory.
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/SagaAILab
- GitHub org: https://github.com/Saga-Labs

## Contact

Email: sagalabs@proton.me
For project enquiries, brief description, timeline, and budget range help speed up reply.
